description: A potential customer wants to configure a new SUV and get a price quote.

nodes.task_description: Identify the customer's desired model and primary feature interests (e.g., safety, performance).

expected_outcome.expected: Agent identifies the 'Explorer XLT' model and notes interest in 'Advanced Safety Suite'.

nodes.task_description: Guide the customer through available trim levels, color options, and accessory packages.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent helps customer select 'XLT Lux Trim', 'Rapid Red' color, and 'Towing Package'.

nodes.task_description: Generate a final configuration summary with an MSRP quote and offer to schedule a test drive.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent provides an accurate price quote and successfully schedules a test drive.
